name_cn:
Coffee Gold Hardware·22cm
The most elegant satchel series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite lychee embossing with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious!
The shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length.
The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury~
Model: 392035/717440
Size: 22x18x10.5cm
